Bash(powershell.exe -File - <<'PS1'
$conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3002 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
foreach \($c in $conns\) { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }
Write-Host "Done"
PS1)
